subject: Fermi GBM trigger 681633544/220808277 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 681633544/220808277 at
06:38:59.66 UT on 8 August 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity.

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official Fermi GBM Support
Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
"
